corrections.current: Προφῆταί σου εἴδοσάν σοι μάταια καὶ ἀφροσύνην,
corrections.correct: Προφῆταί σου εἶδόσάν σοι μάταια καὶ ἀφροσύνην,
corrections.note: Printed form has accented εἶδόσάν; transcription regularized to εἴδοσάν.
No full stop after the acrostic heading on the page.
Apparatus reads πλατειας A, not πλατειαις A.
Marginal siglum is printed in superscript form.
No change to text content; reviewed as correct. Omit if mechanical pipeline disallows no-op corrections.

corrections.location: line 15, variant after αυτη η πολις
corrections.current: αυτης η π. B* (αυτη η π. Bab) η αυτη η π. A ei αυτη η π. Q
corrections.correct: αυτης η π. B* (αυτη η π. Bab) ἢ αυτη η π. A ει αυτη η π. Q
corrections.note: Disjunctive ἢ is printed with accent; transcription has plain η.
In the apparatus the first two forms are printed without accents: ευρομεν, ιδομεν.

uncertain.note: Accentuation on εἶδόσάν is unusual but appears to be printed that way; if normalizing accents is intended, leave as transcripted.

notes: Running head and body largely match. Left margin line numbers 12–16 are correctly not treated as verse text. Apparatus mostly matches; one clear reading is πλατειας A, and there are minor typographic/siglum details.
